lines.speaker: SOFIA LAURENTA
lines.line: Ethan, we got a hit on the encrypted data.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of SOFIA LAURENTA, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: ETHAN WOLFE
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of Sofia, a determined look etched on her face.

lines.speaker: SOFIA LAURENTA
lines.line: Belongs to a high-ranking executive from Omicron Innovations.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of Ethan, his eyes narrowing in focus.

lines.speaker: ETHAN WOLFE
lines.visual_cue: Wide shot of Sofia, her eyes scanning the room as she hands the folder to Ethan.

lines.speaker: SOFIA LAURENTA
lines.line: I've got a bad feeling about this.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of SOFIA LAURENTA, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: ETHAN WOLFE
lines.line: We're just here to ask questions, Sof. Don't get your hackles up.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of Sofia, a hint of unease in her voice.

lines.speaker: SOFIA LAURENTA
lines.line: You know I've got a history with these people, Ethan.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of Ethan, a confident stride as he leads Sofia towards the elevators.

lines.speaker: ETHAN WOLFE
lines.line: Victor, we're not here to play games. Where is the encrypted data?
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of ETHAN WOLFE, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: VICTOR MORRELL
lines.line: I don't know what you're talking about.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of Victor, his eyes darting between Ethan and Sofia.

lines.speaker: SOFIA LAURENTA
lines.line: Don't lie to us, Victor. We have evidence.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of Victor, his voice shaking slightly.

lines.speaker: VICTOR MORRELL
lines.line: Fine... I'll tell you. But you have to protect me.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of Sofia, her eyes narrowing in intensity.
